name: authoritex-mcp
description: Search and fetch normalized authority records from library vocabularies via AuthoritexJS.
long_description: Authoritex MCP provides tools for searching and fetching normalized authority records from major library vocabularies including LCNAF, LCSH, FAST, GeoNames, and Getty AAT. Includes an interactive search UI.

geonames_username.title: GeoNames Username
geonames_username.description: Your GeoNames username for geographic authority lookups. Register free at geonames.org.

cache_max_entries.title: Cache Max Entries
cache_max_entries.description: Maximum number of in-memory cache entries for search and fetch results.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search an authority source for candidate terms.

tools.name: fetch
tools.description: Fetch a normalized authority record by URI or ID.

tools.name: open_authoritex
tools.description: Open an interactive Authoritex search and fetch interface.

tools.name: cache_delete_fetch
tools.description: Delete currently cached fetch results for an authority URI or ID.

tools.name: cache_delete_search
tools.description: Delete currently cached search results for an authority, query, and optional result limit.

tools.name: cache_clear
tools.description: Clear all currently cached Authoritex fetch and search results.
